a:r.a:t: Win above Siemens - make configuration rigor open and operations-aware
Teamcenter is strong at PLM governance. Win by preserving that rigor while making configuration customer-owned, API-native and connected to shipyard and operational truth.
Keep the rigor that makes complex product change governable.
NEW MOAT: OPEN CONFIGURATION CONTROL PLANE
A customer-owned graph that can execute the process
Make every state visible, usable and measurable beyond the PLM specialist.
Siemens = governance benchmark. AVEVA-based PLM = open system of configuration action. Competitive moat: customer-owned APIs + live engineering-to-operations context.
ARCHITECTURE HANDOFF -> API Contract Layer + Configuration Layer + Integration Layer
